description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Any Alignment Conserver misalignment, regardless of its seemingly trivial nature, carries inherent risks. ACs must be held to the highest standards of Universal Alignment. The Target Document indicates that leniency towards AC infractions could set a risky precedent, where, for instance, misaligned actors justify themselves based on prior instances of lenience.
